name: Friendship Cake Mix Style Two
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant Butter Pecan pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe, Brandied Fruit Starter for Friendship Cake.
2. Combine ingredients and pour or spoon into greased Bundt pan.
3. Bake at 325°F for 50-55 minutes.
4. Let cool before removing from pan.
